ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bus stop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bus stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the bus stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the bus stop */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Information about the accessibility of the bus stop */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the bus stop is wheelchair accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bus route */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the bus route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the bus route */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for the bus route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the bus stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the bus stop */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the schedule */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Whether the schedule is for the weekend */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the schedule is for a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES bus_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Bus number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bus */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bus */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the bus was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the bus */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buses_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES bus_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "actual_start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the trip */,
  "actual_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the trip */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip */,
  "driver_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES bus_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* Student ID */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ride */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ride */,
  "source_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source bus stop */,
  "destination_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination bus stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "ride_status" TEXT /* Status of the ride */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Passenger feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES bus_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_destination_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_source_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., card, cash) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the trip */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analytics period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analytics period */,
  "route_performance" TEXT /* Overall performance of the route */,
  "congestion_level" TEXT /* Level of congestion during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES bus_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., administrator, dispatcher, driver) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
